reviews.review_description: unfortunately the demo is steaming garbage. Crashed twice before getting to the stage. when i was finally able to play there were no other instruments or sounds besides the drum and it was really laggy. Sad. maybe the full game doesn't have these problems but we'll never know because i wouldn't dare pay for this after playing the demo.  im on a new, updated quest 3 ( not s) . 0/5 for unplayable

reviews.review_title: Was a great, now is a meh game
reviews.review_description: When I first found this game as a demo it was 1 free, 2 multiplayer, and 3 a fun game to play, now after the full version released it wasn't a multiplayer game and it just got repetitive after a while I know your trying to get more songs but they can't come soon enough, btw this was based off my experience with it right after the full game was launched and could of changed by now so take this rating with a touch of salt

reviews.review_title: far from perfect, but nowhere near bad
reviews.review_description:
there are many suggestions i could make to improve this game, such as lane indicators for bass and improvement on strum/hit detection, but as it is right now, i’d say it’s pretty solid. aside from a few awkward charting practices (which as a guitar hero player i’m not very used to), they still manage to make it fun and challenging to play. it carries on the band-based rhythm game legacy pretty well, and encouraging custom content (as well as providing tools for it) is a huge plus.

i saw they have thorr in the soundtrack too, so maybe the deluxe music pack is worth the $20.

The game is overall good the only thing that i find weird is that every song is literally from some small indie artist/band that no one knows about. I would at least like to see a few big names on here and i would that it would attract more people to play if so. The lack of custom maps are another problem, 
The only problem i think there is, Is just that there isn’t enough custom maps or just songs in general that people actually know.

developer_response.body: Hi there. We get that everyone loves popular songs. But just keep in mind, those hits are super expensive, sometimes more than what it costs to make the game itself. Even the big VR music games you know now started with indie tracks in their early days. As our game grows and profits roll in, we'll definitely reach out to those fan-favorite bands. Also, we're working on making it easier to import custom songs. We believe that'll really get more players involved in creating their own beatmaps.

reviews.review_title: THIS GAME TRULY IS ROCKBAND IN VR!!!
reviews.review_description:
This game feels and plays exactly like the classic rhythm game rockband! You can play any instrument that would be featured in a typical rock band, so things like guitar drums bass and keyboard! In my short time playing, i haven't experienced a single bug or glitch, and the multi-player aspect just adds so much more fun to an already thrilling game! The feeling of playing instruments on stage with other people who can actually talk to you is just jaw-dropping. I would personally even go as far as to say it's the best rhythm game on the quest store! It still has a few problems, though. there is no mod support, so no custom songs or environments, sadly. The current library of songs that we do have access to while really good is still incredibly small. There is also some tracking issue I've experienced while using the drums, but it is very minor. So, do I recommend this game? YES, it is by far the best rhythm game experience the meta quest has to offer! 

(Devs if you're reading this please add mod support and more songs I beg of you 🙏)

reviews.review_title: Amazing game to enjoy with friends!
reviews.review_description:
I met my friends online and we where really eager to find a free multiplayer rhythm game that's fun, I found Band Space and shared it with my friends. We just got it and we are hooked!!

100% my new favorite game!!

Love playing music with friends, it's amazing. But as an App Lab app, fewer chances to meet others in the game, which is a shame. I hope more people can discover this game. Keep up the good work, devs!
This game is insane! I drum for a hobby and to see that this game is a great match I love to go on expert and beat the heck out of some fake drums, while breaking a sweat! 10/10 must play game!

reviews.review_title: A real great experience in vr
reviews.review_description: Great tutorial, great use of the IX instrument, really great songs, this has the potential to be a AAA game in its own genre, if the developers keep it free with the option to buy songs and other upgrade options (how about offering to add combos of riff or creating tools to create your own songs?) could be the way to keep the most Meta users in the game 24/7

I have had this about 2 weeks. It tried it first on my boys headset which led me to actually get one of my own. This game is absolutely great. The songs, though not well known, are fun to play along with and definitely help those artists get some more attention. I can't complain about anything really. Just like anyone else who wants to see big title tracks, I feel the same. However I understand that working with record labels can be a pain in this but, so I'll just wait til some popular songs comes out.
the game doesn't let me go past the calibrate page I press calibrate and it do nun

developer_response.body: Sorry about that. We've fixed the issue in our latest version, so please update and try again. If you need any help, don't hesitate to reach out to us on Discord (https://discord.com/invite/hZA9xsfYnn).

reviews.review_description: It's really nice just needs work like the guitar still gonna give it five might be cause idk how to do the guitar that's fine but I love the drums
A really good game I enjoy it a lot it's a little bit janky but other than that it was an amazing game good job to the devs
Every time I try to play the game it will not work

Just downloaded this and I am aware that it is early access but this game is unplayable. The controllers don't track and the lag is extreme. Constant stutters. Like 2 fps level of stutter. Couldn't even play because the controllers wouldn't track and respond to allow me to calibrate.  Might give it another try after it is out of early access, but for now I cannot recommend this app.  Save your storage space for now.

developer_response.body:
Hi, we're really sorry about this. We haven't heard about this issue from other players either. Could you please tell us the model of your device and the version of your system? 

Feel free to join our Discord (https://discord.com/invite/hZA9xsfYnn) so we can sort this out together.

reviews.review_description: I love how much it feels like Guitar Hero/Rock Band. If you've played them before, you know exactly what to expect. I'd really love it more if there's a multiplayer custom songs though.

developer_response.body: Let's rock on! We'll definitely consider the upgrade regarding custom songs. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: It's so nice to have a free alternative to beat saber. The game is actually quite addictive so just see yourself getting sucked in and playing as hard as you can. My only complaint is that the guitars are a bit hard to play.
Not the best the controls are not the best and my timing was right but it said that I had missed and that was a little annoying to say less. Tbh it could be better.

developer_response.body: I'm sorry to hear that. We're working on improving the accuracy of the controls. It would be helpful if you could let us know which instruments you're referring to in your feedback. Feel free to join our Discord server to provide your feedback. Here's the invitation link: https://discord.com/invite/hZA9xsfYnn

reviews.review_description: This game is so fun

clearly the best music game I could find on metaquest
In french we says « un vrais banger woula »

developer_response.body: Thanks for the recognition. More free and fun updates are on the way!
